name: stackra/wallet
purpose: Multi-owner wallet substrate — Wallet + WalletTransaction + WalletHold aggregates for balance tracking, holds during checkout, and immutable debits.
capabilities: Wallet aggregate (wal_ prefix) — one per (owner, kind, currency)
WalletHold (whd_ prefix) — reserved balance during checkout
Polymorphic wallet owner (user, tenant, service account)
when_to_use: A user or tenant needs a stored-value balance with hold-and-capture semantics separate from external gateways.
when_not_to_use: For gateway-backed payments, use stackra/payment. For the accounting ledger, use stackra/transaction.
